_instructions: Copy this file and fill in the fields below. Each search variation needs a unique ID, descriptive label, mode (cases or authorities), and the exact query text to enter into the search box. Minimum 5 searches, recommended 7.

cases._note: REQUIRED: Search for a known landmark case by name
cases.label: Case Name Lookup

cases._note: REQUIRED: Key legal terms separated by spaces
cases.label: Keyword Stacking
cases.query: [e.g., Texas non-compete overbroad reformation employer breach]

cases._note: REQUIRED: A narrow query targeting one specific legal argument
cases.label: Narrow Single Issue
cases.query: [e.g., employer materially breached employment agreement can non-compete still be enforced]

cases._note: REQUIRED: A single legal issue framed as a precise question
cases.label: Focused Legal Question
cases.query: [e.g., enforceability of overbroad non-compete under Texas Business and Commerce Code Section 15.50]

cases._note: REQUIRED: Full fact pattern pasted as a semantic/NLP query
cases.label: Full Fact Pattern (Semantic/NLP)
cases.query: [Paste a condensed version of the full fact pattern here]

authorities._note: RECOMMENDED: Exact statute citation in standard format
authorities.label: Exact Statute Citation

authorities._note: RECOMMENDED: Natural language description of the statute
authorities.label: Descriptive Statute Query
authorities.query: [e.g., Texas covenants not to compete act]
